chief_complaint: 60-year-old female presenting with severe generalized body aches, fatigue, and marked weakness in the proximal muscles of her limbs.
history: Patient with a background of coronary artery disease and acute coronary syndrome, who underwent percutaneous coronary intervention and stenting 2 months prior. She was on high-intensity statin (atorvastatin 80 mg daily) and other guideline-recommended drugs.
exam: Vital signs: not provided. Physical examination: marked weakness in the proximal muscles of her limbs.
labs: Creatine phosphokinase level: 36,210 units/L. Renal parameters: not provided.
